title: Swugcraft
body:
Swugcraft is a modpack that is intended to be a lightly-modded experience apt for players that are new to modding. It includes several quality of life mods like AppleSkin, Carry On, and Cooking For Blockheads, alongside some light content mods that add extra dungeons and structures. Also, it has Mekanism, because I like Mekanism, and I find it really accessible. 

Note: While this modpack is fairly lightweight, be sure to increase your dedicated RAM in your Modrinth settings to at least 4GB (4096MB) for an optimal experience.



Attribution:

    [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
    [Corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)

    [Polylib Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polylib)
